verses.text: Manasseh in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmlenih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmngalenga sung uk hi
Topa in Israel minamte' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minamte' zat a kihhuai gamtatnate mah bangin, Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa Hezekiah in a suksiatsa mual dawna biakpiaknate amah in lamkikin, Baal-te-a' dingin biakna taute phut a, Asherah milimte bawlin vantung nate khempeuh bia a, tuate' na sem hi
Topa in, “Jerusalem-ah ka min om tawntung ding hi,” a cihna Topa' biakinn sungah amah in biakna taute a lam hi
Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakinn tual nihte sungah vantung nate khempeuh-a' dingin biakna taute lam hi

Tua ciangin amah in Hinnom' tapa' kuamah biakna-in a tapate hal a, aisanna leh mailam thugenkholhna leh khongkhaina zang a, vankah theite leh aisante tawh na semkhawm hi. Amah in Topa' muhna-ah siatna tampi bawl a, amah hehsak hi

Tua ciangin Pasian in David leh a tapa Solomon tungah, “Amaute ka thupiak khempeuh, thukham khempeuh, ngeinate, leh Moses tung tawnin a kipia biakna ngeina kipte zuih ding a kidop nak uh leh, Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teelkhiat hih biakinn sung leh Jerusalem sungah ka min ka koih tawntung ding hi. Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh-a' dingin ka sehsa gam panin Israel-te ka khinkhia nawn kei ding hi,” a cih Pasian' biakinn sungah amah in ama bawlsa milim koih hi
Manasseh in Judah leh Jerusalem-a tengte zol ahih manin, Israel mite' mai-ah Topa in a suksiat minamte sangin amaute a sia tamzaw gamta uh hi
Topa in Manasseh tung leh ama mite tungah thu gen a, ahih hangin amaute in donlo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa' galkap ukte amau' kiangah paipih a, amaute in sikkawite tawh Manasseh manin sumngo khau tawh khihin Babylon-ah a paipih uh hi
Amah a lungkham ciangin Topa a Pasian kunh-in a pu a pate' Pasian' mai-ah nakpi takin amahmah kiniamkhiat hi

Amah in ama kiangah thu ngen a, tua ciangin Pasian in ama kutna saangin, a thumna a ngai hi. Amah in Jerusalem-ah amah paipih kikin a kumpi gam a piakik hi. Tua ciangin Topa pen Pasian ahihna Manasseh in a thei hi

Tua khit ciangin amah in kuam sung, Gihon nitumna lam, David khuapi-ah, Ngasa Kongpi lutna lamah kulh puanung khat ciang a, Ofel kiimah ciang suakin a sang mahmahin ciangto hi. Amah in Judah gamsunga kulhnei khuapi khempeuhah zong galkap a ukte koih hi
Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakinn panin gamdang pasian-te leh a milim lakhia a, Topa' biakinn mualtung leh Jerusalem-a ama lamsa biakna tau khempeuh lakhia-in, khuapi pualamah tuate paii hi
Amah in Topa' biakna tau zong koihkikin tua tungah thunuama biakna leh lungdam kohna a pia hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian, Topa' na a sepna dingun Judah-te thu a pia hi
Ahi zongin mite in mual dawna biakpiaknate-ah biakna pia lai uh a, ahih hangin Topa amaute' Pasian' tung bek mahah a piak uh ahi hi
Tu-in Manasseh' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a Pasian' tungah a thungetna, leh Israel Pasian, Topa' min tawh ama tungah thu a gen thumute' thugente, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu sungah om hi

Tua ciangin ama thungetna, leh ama kutna Pasian in a san'na, leh ama khialhna leh a cihtaklohna khempeuh, leh amah a kiniamkhiat ma-in mual dawna biakpiaknate bawlin Asherah-te leh milim dangte a koihna munte thu, Thumute' Khang Tangthu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Manasseh si a, amaute in a inn sungah vui uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Amon in ama tangin a uk hi.
Amon in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum nih sung uk hi
A pa Manasseh' gamtatnasa khempeuh bangin Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amon in a pa Manasseh' bawlsa milim khempeuh tungah biakna pia a, tuate' na sem hi
A pa Manasseh a kiniamkhiat bangin Topa' mai-ah amah kiniamkhiatlo a, hih Amon in mawhna tam piangsak semsem hi
Tua ciangin ama nasemte in amah sawmsimin ama inn sungah amah that uh hi
Ahih hangin tua gam mite in Kumpi Amon a sawmsim khempeuh that leuleu uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam mite in ama tangin a tapa Josiah kumpi-in a koih uh hi.
